ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., reaction time, decision making) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the experiment */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "languages_spoken" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the participant */,
  "previous_experiment_ids" TEXT /* IDs of previous experiments the participant has been involved in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the task in seconds */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount offered or involved in the task */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of a certain outcome */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of the task (e.g., cognitive, physical) */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the task */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcomes of the task */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the task */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the task */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who responded */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being responded to */,
  "onset" REAL /* Time of onset for the task */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  "chose_accept" INTEGER /* Whether the participant chose to accept the task */,
  "chose_right" INTEGER /* Whether the participant chose the right option */,
  "task_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task version */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Participant's confidence level in their response (0-1) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the participant */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used by the participant (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_participants" (
  "experiment_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the experiment (e.g., primary, control) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the participant started the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the participant completed the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's involvement (e.g., active, dropped out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the report is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "total_pages" INTEGER /* Total number of pages in the report */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_versions_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission applies to */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the permission */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the notification */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the setting */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
